rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks only into component type or implementation scopes based on whether the contract references visible features or implementation-level bindings.
Preserve AADL structure by ensuring annex placement does not alter component hierarchies or introduce invalid scope references.
generic_rules: Use only visible ports or explicitly declared variables in AGREE contracts; avoid subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
Place implementation-level assignments in implementation annexes, not component type annexes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in annex agree {** ... **};
Use eq declarations to define boolean range conditions for guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as if they are AGREE variables.
Avoid using subcomponent port names directly in component type annexes.
irrelevant_topics: type scope range assumption and guarantee
AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
